_comment: LaunchAgents and long-running processes that make up the Merlin always-on server.

services.name: claude-session
services.label: ai.claude.session
services.description: Launches process-manager which supervises chat-supervisor, ops-supervisor, and hookdeck. KeepAlive=true.

services.name: claude-heartbeat
services.label: com.example.merlin-heartbeat
services.description: Posts system health to Firebase RTDB every 120s.

services.name: resilience-test
services.label: ai.claude.resilience-test
services.description: Scheduled kill-tests of the agent to verify recovery. StartCalendarInterval.

services.name: actions-runner
services.label: actions.runner.${MERLIN_OWNER}-merlin.${MERLIN_HOST}-merlin
services.description: GitHub Actions self-hosted runner for ${MERLIN_OWNER}/merlin (iOS/macOS TestFlight builds).

services.name: process-manager-health
services.description: Process-manager HTTP health endpoint. Returns child process status.
